raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas Klings
KUNGS: Tadeht ka tu eſt ar
Rohkahm planktebkinajſi/ un ar
Rahjahm tramdiſi/ un eſt no
wiffas Sirde Spehka preezaj-
fees pahr Israêta Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz rangt/ es iſsteep-
fchu fawn Rohku prett tevi/ un
dohſchu tevi teem Paganeem
par Laupſhumu/ un iſdeldefchu
tewi no teem Laudim/ un nomat-
takhu teewi no tahm Walſtim;
Es iſdeldefchu teewi/ un tu fa-
juttiti/ ka es tas KUNGS eſimu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas Kungs
KUNGS: Tapehz ka Moabs
un Seirs fakka: Redſi/ tas
Natus Iuhda irr ta ka wiﬀi
Pagani..
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht rangi/ es atwehr-
fchu Moaba Sahnw no teem
Pileſfahteen/ no winna Rohbe-
schu Pileſfahteen/ winna Sem-
mes Janfummu/ Betjeſimotu/
Baal Meonu/ un Kirjatatuu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teem Behrneem prett
Austrumn ar Ammona Behr-
neem/ un es dohſchu winnu par
Gemantofchann/ ta ka Ammona
Behrui starp teem Paganeem ne
taps wats peeminneti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es tarrefchu arridsan
Gondibn eekſch Menaba/ un tec-
fajuttihſ/ ka es tas KUNGS
eſmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas Klings
KUNGS: Tadeht ka Eedans
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht ta fakka tas
Klings KUNGS: Ires iſsteep-
fchu fawn Rohku prett Eedomu/
un iſdeldefchu no winna Zilwe-
kus un Lohpus/ un es darrſchn
to par pohtu Weetu no Teema-
xa/ un tee krittihs lihds Deda-
nam zaur Sohbinu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es iſlaidischu fawn
Atreepschann pee Eedoma/ zaur
to Rohku mannu Lauschu Isra-
etu/ un tee darrihſ ar Eedomu
pehz mannas Duſmibas/ un pehz
mannas Bahrsibas/ ta fajut-
tihs tee mannu Atreepſchann/
fakka tas Klings KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas Klings
KUNGS: Tadeht ka tee Willi-
ſteri irr Atreepſchann iſlatdifebi/
un no Sirde Spehka irr atree-
buſchees fainaitaht pehz wezzas
Eenaidibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht ta fakka tas Klings
KUNGS: Redſi/ es iſsteepju
fawn Rohku pahr teem Williſte-
reem/ un iſdeldefchu tohs Boh-
ſitajus/ un maitafchu tohs At-
likkuſchus Jahr-Mallä.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un iſlaidischu leelu At-
reepſchann ar bahrgahm Sohdi-
bahm starp winneem/ un tee fu-
juttihſ/ ka es tas KUNGS eſ-
mu/ kad es fawn Atreepſchann
starp teem ejmu iſlaidis.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
